data.title: Sei Proposes EVM-Only Future to Simplify Network
data.description:
Supporting both EVM and CosmWasm has helped attract a wide range of users and developers. But this dual-architecture approach has also created serious headaches. A new proposal suggests streamlining Sei into a fully EVM-based chain. The goal is to reduce developer pain, infrastructure complexity, and user confusion
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/sei-proposes-evm-only-future-to-simplify-network/

data.title: Upbit announces the launch of TIA Korean Won trading pair and IO/USDT trading pair
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of Upbit, the platform has launched Celestia (TIA) and Ionet (IO) trading pairs. Among them, TIA supports KRW, BTC and USDT market transactions, and IO supports BTC and USDT markets. Users can conduct spot transactions in the corresponding markets.

data.title: Swedish Central Bank Maintains Policy Rate at 2.25%
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Swedish central bank has decided to keep its policy interest rate unchanged at 2.25%. This decision aligns with market expectations, which also anticipated the rate to remain at 2.25%. The bank's move reflects its ongoing assessment of economic conditions and monetary policy requirements.

data.title: Whales have accumulated more than 3.7 million PENDLE tokens, with a profit of $1.55 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, since the end of March, a whale or institution has been withdrawing and hoarding PENDLE from Binance through multiple addresses. In just half an hour, the address withdrew 538,000 PENDLE again, which is equivalent to about 1.83 million US dollars at the current price. Over the past month, it has accumulated 3.702 million PENDLE through 6 addresses, with a total cost of about 11.04 million US dollars, and a current floating profit of 1.55 million US dollars, with an overall yield of about 14%.

data.title: Crypto Portfolio Management: Diversification and Risk Strategies
data.description:
Managing a crypto portfolio might sound like something only finance nerds or day traders worry about—but it’s actually for anyone who owns more than one type of crypto. Think of it like building a team in a game: you want different strengths, solid backups, and a strategy that keeps you from losing everything in one bad move. In crypto, prices can jump or drop in minutes, so having a plan matters. That’s where portfolio management comes in—it’s how you balance your coins, avoid putting all your hopes into one token, and protect your digital stash from wild market swings
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/05/08/crypto-portfolio-management-diversification-and-risk-strategies/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=crypto-portfolio-management-diversification-and-risk-strategies

data.title: Market Trends Indicate Bullish Sentiment in Cryptocurrency Trading
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the funding rates on major centralized and decentralized exchanges currently suggest a bullish trend in the market. The funding rates for key cryptocurrencies are detailed in the accompanying chart.

Funding rates are fees set by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain a balance between contract prices and the prices of the underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This mechanism facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the platform charging this fee, to adjust the cost or profit of holding contracts, ensuring that contract prices remain close to the underlying asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% indicates a baseline rate. When the funding rate exceeds 0.01%, it signifies a general bullish sentiment in the market. Conversely, a funding rate below 0.005% indicates a bearish sentiment.

data.title: GitHub Repository t3rn-swap Found with Backdoor Code
data.description: According to PANews, a GitHub repository named t3rn-swap has been discovered to contain backdoor code, as disclosed by X user @Xuegaogx. The code silently sends users' private keys to a specified ID via Telegram, with the critical backdoor located in the record_config function. The project's author, @hao3313076, responded by stating that he was also a victim of theft, although his comments were criticized for being overly candid. The community is urging users to immediately cease using the script and replace any affected private keys.

data.title: BitMart market report: BTC fluctuates upward and is only one step away from returning to $100,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to BitMart's market report on May 8, the total market value of the cryptocurrency market is 3.28 trillion US dollars, up 2.58% from the previous day; BTC fluctuated upward, and it was only one step away from returning to 100,000 US dollars. BTCD temporarily reported 64.4%, hitting a new high in nearly four years; ETH followed the rise and fall of the market, and the ETH/BTC exchange rate fell below 0.019 again. ETH lacked the opportunity to break out of the independent market; altcoins generally rose, but there were not many tokens that were significantly stronger than the market performance, and the fully circulated meme coins performed well; the fear and greed index was 53, which was in the "neutral" range. The comprehensive long-short ratio was 1.23. The market sentiment was neutral in the short term, and the wait-and-see sentiment was strong. Investors need to pay close attention to the subsequent capital flow and sentiment changes.
